title: BLUELIGHT RAT: Data Exfiltration via OneDrive/Graph API
description: Detects large data uploads to Microsoft Graph API from non-OneDrive processes. BLUELIGHT exfiltrates collected screenshots, credentials, and system data by uploading to OneDrive via Graph API, blending with legitimate cloud storage traffic.
query: ('Log Source' = 'Windows Sysmon Events' or 'Log Source' = 'Windows Sysmon Operational Logs' or 'Log Source' = 'SOC Sysmon Network Logs' or 'Log Source' = 'SOC Windows Sysmon Logs') and (('Event ID' = '3' and 'Destination Hostname' like '*graph.microsoft.com*') and not (('Process Name' like '*\\OneDrive.exe' or 'Process Name' like '*\\Teams.exe' or 'Process Name' like '*\\OUTLOOK.EXE'))) | stats count as Connections by 'Process Name', 'Source IP', 'Host Name' | where Connections > 1 | sort -Connections
falsepositives: Custom applications using Microsoft Graph API for file uploads
splunk_original: index=sysmon EventCode=3 DestinationHostname="graph.microsoft.com" NOT Image IN ("*onedrive.exe","*teams.exe","*outlook.exe") | stats sum(bytes_out) as TotalUpload by Image, SourceIp | where TotalUpload > 5000000 | sort - TotalUpload
